title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 193.195 - Marriage license recording fee
text:
193.195.  Marriage license recording fee. — Every officer authorized to issue marriage licenses shall be paid a recording fee of two dollars for each marriage license filed and reported by him or her to the state registrar.  The recording fee shall be paid by the applicant for the license and be collected together with the fee for the license.
(L. 1984 S.B. 574)
